children.name: Built for Founders, Proven in Production
children.characters: Built for Founders,  Proven in Production

children.name: Travel companies worldwide trust MaqsoodTravel to power their booking platforms.
children.characters: Travel companies worldwide trust MaqsoodTravel to power their booking platforms.

children.name: quote
children.characters: “We were paying for three separate tools that barely talked to each other. MaqqsedTravel replaced all of them. Our agents now search every GDS from one screen, under our own brand. We were live in under 6 weeks.”

children.name: "Switching off Amadeus felt risky. MaqqsedTravel had us connected to Sabre, NDC and Travelport in week one. We kept our existing contracts — nothing changed for our clients."
